step_rationale: Cardiomyocyte stress/injury marker; inverse LVEF association.
mechanism: Cystatin B is a protease inhibitor released during myocardial ischemia and injury, with levels inversely correlating to left ventricular function.

references.title: Using proximity extension proteomics assay to identify biomarkers associated with infarct size and ejection fraction after ST-elevation myocardial infarction.
